creator: OWASP

evidence.text: ![AOS Banner](docs/assets/banner.png) **Making AI agents trustworthy by standardizing observability.** ## Rational Agents must become trustworthy to enable widescale adoption. Transparency is the foundation of trust. Whether built in-house or adopted as part of a service. Consumed on cloud, as SaaS, on-prem or on endpoints. Agents must be fully observable by the enterprise that welcomes them in. We cannot trust a magic black-box. For agents to become trustworthy they must be **inspectable, traceable and instrumentable**. - **Inspectable:** w
